top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand_id,
    i_brand,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales
FROM 
    item,
    catalog_sales,
    web_sales,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    i_brand_id,
    i_brand
ORDER BY 
    catalog_sales DESC,
    web_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_brand_id,
    i_brand,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk 
        AND date_dim.d_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    i_brand_id, i_brand
ORDER BY 
    to...

WITH catalog_sales_brand AS (
    SELECT 
        i_brand_id,
        i_brand,
        SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales
    FROM 
        catalog_sales
        JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY 
        i_brand_id, i_brand
),
web_sales_brand AS (
    SELECT 
        i_brand_id,
        i_brand,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS tot...
